notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q MD&A (part 1 of 2, accession 0001546417-25-000141, 2025-11-06); part 2 handled by another bot. fiscal_kpis is null on this chunk, so no KPI rewrites.
All 43 evidence_quote strings programmatically verified as exact substrings of the event content.
